name: Chishiya Shuntaro (Alice in Bordeland Tv series)
description:
Shuntaro Chishiya is one of the main characters in Alice in Borderland.

Prior to his appearance in the Borderlands, Chishiya worked as a junior doctor with a job at Sakurazawa University Hospital, his practice being within pediatric cardiovascular surgery. It was shown through a flashback that he had a patient named Hayato. Chishiya was seen comforting the boy and then reassuring him that his condition was more stable and his surgery would be happening the following week.

Afterwards, a superior took Chishiya aside to inform him that Hayato's surgery would have to be postponed because the organ transplant waiting list order had changed. Handing Chishiya an envelope containing a patient referral, the colleague explained that the friend of the hospital director would be the one getting the transplant, which had originally been slated for Hayato, as they had been a large financial donor to the hospital. When Chishiya asked about Hayato, his colleague told him that Hayato would get a transplant later, and that Chishiya would have to break this news to Hayato.

After Hayato's death, Chishiya's colleague tried to justify the decision by saying that even if Hayato had undergone the surgery on schedule, there was no guarantee that it would have been effective. He further stated that doctors cannot always work by their own ideals, and that money, power, and connections often affect the outcome. This was a pivotal moment for Chishiya, as it started him down the path of becoming cynical and disillusioned by the injustices within the medical system. He realized that at times, he would not be permitted to live up to his own ideals and that his most vulnerable patients would pay the price. This brief flashback also showed a softer, caring side of Chishiya, as he was hopeful of helping another person.
creator: Kitty Kat 666
